# revolut_plan_variation (Data Source)

Look up a single pricing variation within a Revolut subscription plan. The variation is read out of its parent plan (GET /subscription-plans/{plan_id}) and located by id.

## Example Usage

```terraform
data "revolut_plan_variation" "existing" {
  plan_id = "11111111-2222-3333-4444-555555555555"
  id      = "66666666-7777-8888-9999-000000000000"
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `id` (String) Variation UUID to look up.
- `plan_id` (String) UUID of the parent plan.

### Read-Only

- `phases` (Attributes List) Ordered billing phases of this variation. (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--phases))
- `trial_duration` (String) ISO-8601 trial duration for this variation.

<a id="nestedatt--phases"></a>
### Nested Schema for `phases`

Read-Only:

- `amount` (Number) Phase amount in minor units.
- `currency` (String) ISO-4217 currency code.
- `cycle_count` (Number) Number of cycles before advancing; null = open-ended.
- `cycle_duration` (String) ISO-8601 billing cycle duration (e.g. P1M).
- `id` (String) Server-assigned phase UUID.
- `ordinal` (Number) Phase order (0-based).
- `subscription_items` (Attributes List) Line items billed in this phase. (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--phases--subscription_items))

<a id="nestedatt--phases--subscription_items"></a>
### Nested Schema for `phases.subscription_items`

Read-Only:

- `amount` (Number) Item amount in minor units.
- `quantity` (Number) Item quantity.
- `type` (String) Item type (flat | usage).
